reviews.comment:
Poca paciencia del personal ante una carga fuera de lo normal de automóviles. El lugar algo mejorado respecto a veces anteriores

(Translated by Google)
The staff showed little patience with an unusually high volume of cars. The place was somewhat improved compared to previous times.

reviews.comment:
Necesito si alguien pasa mañana domingo le diga al parador del acá que me olvidé hoy una botella con pico de mi gorda  y llora que lo quiere.le pueden avisar que lo paso a buscar

(Translated by Google)
If anyone is passing by tomorrow, Sunday, please tell the person at the rest stop here that I forgot a bottle of my daughter's liquor today, and she's crying because she wants it. Can you let them know I'll come pick it up?
